creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 257580
c37936ff4e616804b7cefecd48d0e7f4a672238e from D49018

Only remaining change would be to use a `version: "0.1.0",` consistently
in mix.exs and rely on ports framework with DISTVERSIONSUFFIX to handle
-rc.3 type names during release candidates. BEAM releases are probably
best left as simple X.Y.Z numeric names, nobody will be installing
different OTP releases adjacent from ports, so there is no conflict.
